channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Common Walking Mistakes and How to Correct Them
item.description: Walking is an excellent low-impact exercise, but improper footwear, pace, or routine can hinder progress and cause injury.

item.title: Could Yogurt Help Prevent Colon Cancer?
11 Natural Ways to Lower Your Cortisol Levels
Three Genes May Link Six Mental Disorders via Shared Biomarkers
item.description: Neuropsychiatric conditions like schizophrenia, bipolar disorder, and ADHD may share genetic biomarkers linked to three genes.
